title: Relating to a national emergency by the President on February 1, 2025.
plain_summary: This bill ends a national emergency that the President declared on February 1, 2025. Congress has the power to stop national emergencies that the President announces. They are using this power through a law called the National Emergencies Act. The bill simply cancels the emergency declaration from that date.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Foreign Affairs.

sections.title: Joint Resolution
sections.text: This joint resolution uses the National Emergencies Act to end a national emergency. The President declared this national emergency on February first, twenty twenty-five, in Executive Order fourteen thousand one hundred ninety-four. Congress is voting to terminate this emergency declaration immediately.
